title: What's new with data agents
summary: Google Cloud presents updates to data analytics agents with enhanced capabilities for data engineering, science, and conversational analytics. New developer tools include the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations, accessible through Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and VSCode.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech outlines updates to its data analytics agents, with expanded capabilities across data engineering, data science, and conversational analytics. The video also covers new developer tools, including the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations. These integrations are accessible through Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and VSCode, placing agent workflows inside common development environments.
